description: F&B establishments promote Ramadan iftar dining experiences with blessing greetings, pricing, and direct contact information to drive holiday reservations.
structural_recipe: Open with 'رمضان مبارك' blessing greeting. State venue name and signature iftar offering. Include per-person pricing in SAR. Provide clear phone booking number. Use simple, direct copy emphasizing feast availability and convenience of reservation.
why_it_works: Ramadan is peak dining season in Saudi Arabia. Combining religious greeting (رمضان مبارك) establishes cultural resonance and trust. Transparent pricing and direct call-to-action remove friction from booking decisions. Iftar gatherings are family tradition, making promotional framing around hospitality deeply motivational.
transplantation_caveats: Requires authentic Ramadan timing—posting outside Islamic calendar reduces relevance
Pricing must align with local market expectations and venue tier
Phone number format must be locally valid (Saudi +966 or 0xx format)
Cultural sensitivity: positioning as community gathering experience rather than commercial transaction strengthens appeal
cultural_constraints: Must respect Islamic calendar and Ramadan observance period
Should emphasize halal and Islamic dietary compliance
Family-oriented framing preferred over individual consumption messaging
